docker_compose_config_text_truncated:
name: llm_serving
services:
  dcgm-exporter:
    cap_add:
      - SYS_ADMIN
    container_name: llms_dcgm_exporter
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - capabilities:
                - gpu
              driver: nvidia
              count: -1
    environment:
      NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: all
    image: nvcr.io/nvidia/k8s/dcgm-exporter:3.3.6-3.4.2-ubuntu22.04
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9400
        published: "9400"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
  grafana:
    container_name: llms_grafana
    depends_on:
      prometheus:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    environment:
      GF_DASHBOARDS_DEFAULT_HOME_DASHBOARD_PATH: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/llm_serving_overview.json
      GF_INSTALL_PLUGINS: grafana-clock-panel,grafana-piechart-panel
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin123
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER: admin
      GF_USERS_ALLOW_SIGN_UP: "false"
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: grafana_serving_data
        target: /var/lib/grafana
        volume: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving/grafana/provisioning
        target: /etc/grafana/provisioning
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving/grafana/dashboards
        target: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
  litellm:
    command:
      - --config
      - /app/config.yaml
      - --port
      - "4001"
      - --num_workers
      - "4"
    container_name: llms_litellm
    depends_on:
      litellm-db:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://litellm_serving:servingpass9090@litellm-db:5432/litellm_serving
      GF_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin123
      GF_ADMIN_USER: admin
      LITELLM_MASTER_KEY: sk-llmserving-master-key
      LITELLM_SALT_KEY: sk-llmserving-salt-key
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin
      MINIO_BUCKET: models
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: minio:9000
      MINIO_ENDPOINT_PUBLIC: localhost:9100
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin123
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: minioadmin123
      MLFLOW_S3_ENDPOINT_URL: http://localhost:9100
      MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI: http://localhost:5000
      MODEL_PATH_IN_MINIO: gemma-1b-finetune
      POSTGRES_DB: litellm_serving
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: servingpass9090
      POSTGRES_USER: litellm_serving
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PASSWORD: redis_serving_pass
      REDIS_PORT: "6379"
      SERVED_MODEL_NAME: gemma-1b-finetune
      SGLANG_CHUNKED_PREFILL_SIZE: "2048"
      SGLANG_CONTEXT_LENGTH: "4096"
      SGLANG_MAX_PREFILL_TOKENS: "4096"
      SGLANG_MAX_RUNNING_REQUESTS: "32"
      SGLANG_MEM_FRACTION_STATIC: "0.32"
      SGLANG_PORT: "30002"
      STORE_MODEL_IN_DB: "True"
      UI_PASSWORD: admin123
      UI_USERNAME: admin
      VLLM_GPU_DEVICE: "0"
      VLLM_GPU_MEM: "0.34"
      VLLM_PORT: "30003"
    extra_hosts:
      - host.docker.internal=host-gateway
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - python3 -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:4001/health/liveliness')"
      timeout: 10s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 1m30s
    image: ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:main-stable
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 4001
        published: "4001"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving/litellm/config.yaml
        target: /app/config.yaml
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
  litellm-db:
    container_name: llms_litellm_db
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: litellm_serving
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: servingpass9090
      POSTGRES_USER: litellm_serving
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -d litellm_serving -U litellm_serving
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 5s
      retries: 10
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5433"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: always
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: litellm_serving_pg_data
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
  minio:
    command:
      - server
      - /data
      - --console-address
      - :9001
    container_name: llms_minio
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin123
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - mc
        - ready
        - local
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 20s
    image: minio/minio:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9000
        published: "9100"
        protocol: tcp
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9001
        published: "9101"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: minio_serving_data
        target: /data
        volume: {}
  minio-init:
    container_name: llms_minio_init
    depends_on:
      minio:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - |

          mc alias set local http://minio:9000 $$MINIO_ROOT_USER $$MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD &&
          mc mb --ignore-existing local/$$MINIO_BUCKET &&
          mc anonymous set none local/$$MINIO_BUCKET &&
          echo 'Bucket ready: '$$MINIO_BUCKET
    environment:
      MINIO_BUCKET: models
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin123
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
    image: minio/mc:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    restart: "no"
  mlflow:
    command:
      - sh
      - -c
      - pip install boto3 && mlflow server --backend-store-uri sqlite:////mlflow/mlflow.db --default-artifact-root s3://models/mlflow --serve-artifacts --host 0.0.0.0
    container_name: llms_mlflow
    depends_on:
      minio:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: minioadmin
      AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1
      AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin123
      MLFLOW_S3_ENDPOINT_URL: http://localhost:9100
    image: ghcr.io/mlflow/mlflow:v2.11.3
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5000
        published: "5000"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: mlflow_serving_data
        target: /mlflow
        volume: {}
  model-sync:
    container_name: llms_model_sync
    depends_on:
      model-uploader:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - |

          mc alias set local http://minio:9000 $$MINIO_ROOT_USER $$MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD &&
          echo 'Syncing model from MinIO s3://$$MINIO_BUCKET/$$MODEL_PREFIX/ ...' &&
          mc mirror --overwrite local/$$MINIO_BUCKET/$$MODEL_PREFIX /model/ &&
          echo 'Model sync complete.' && ls -lh /model/
    environment:
      MINIO_BUCKET: models
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin123
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
      MODEL_PREFIX: gemma-1b-finetune
    image: minio/mc:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    restart: "no"
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: model_weights
        target: /model
        volume: {}
  model-uploader:
    build:
      context: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving
      dockerfile: dockerfiles/Dockerfile.uploader
    container_name: llms_model_uploader
    depends_on:
      minio-init:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
    environment:
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin
      MINIO_BUCKET: models
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: minio:9000
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: minioadmin123
      MODEL_PREFIX: gemma-1b-finetune
      MODEL_SRC_DIR: /model-src
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    restart: "no"
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/gemma-1b-finetune
        target: /model-src
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
  node-exporter:
    command:
      - --path.rootfs=/host
      - --path.procfs=/host/proc
      - --path.sysfs=/host/sys
      - --collector.filesystem.mount-points-exclude=^/(sys|proc|dev|host|etc)($$|/)
    container_name: llms_node_exporter
    image: prom/node-exporter:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    pid: host
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9100
        published: "9102"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /proc
        target: /host/proc
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /sys
        target: /host/sys
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /
        target: /host
        read_only: true
        bind:
          propagation: rslave
  prometheus:
    command:
      - --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
      - --storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus
      - --storage.tsdb.retention.time=30d
      - --web.enable-lifecycle
    container_name: llms_prometheus
    image: prom/prometheus:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9090
        published: "9091"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving/prometheus/prometheus.yml
        target: /etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving/prometheus/alert_rules.yml
        target: /etc/prometheus/alert_rules.yml
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: volume
        source: prometheus_serving_data
        target: /prometheus
        volume: {}
  redis:
    command:
      - redis-server
      - --requirepass
      - redis_serving_pass
      - --maxmemory
      - 512mb
      - --maxmemory-policy
      - allkeys-lru
    container_name: llms_redis
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - -a
        - redis_serving_pass
        - ping
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
    image: redis:7-alpine
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 6379
        published: "6380"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: redis_serving_data
        target: /data
        volume: {}
  redis-exporter:
    container_name: llms_redis_exporter
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    environment:
      REDIS_ADDR: redis://redis:6379
      REDIS_PASSWORD: redis_serving_pass
    image: oliver006/redis_exporter:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 9121
        published: "9121"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
  sglang:
    container_name: llms_sglang
    depends_on:
      model-sync:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - capabilities:
                - gpu
              driver: nvidia
              count: -1
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/bash
      - /entrypoint.sh
    environment:
      AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: minioadmin
      AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1
      AWS_ENDPOINT_URL: http://minio:9000
      AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin123
      NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES: compute,utility
      NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: all
      S3_ENDPOINT_URL: http://minio:9000
      SGLANG_CHUNKED_PREFILL_SIZE: "2048"
      SGLANG_CONTEXT_LENGTH: "4096"
      SGLANG_MAX_PREFILL_TOKENS: "4096"
      SGLANG_MAX_RUNNING_REQUESTS: "32"
      SGLANG_MEM_FRACTION_STATIC: "0.32"
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -sf http://localhost:30002/health || exit 1
      timeout: 10s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 2m0s
    image: lmsysorg/sglang:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 30002
        published: "30002"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: model_weights
        target: /model
        read_only: true
        volume: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /mnt/oldssd/home/pc/Documents/cole_labs/llm_serving/scripts/sglang_entrypoint.sh
        target: /entrypoint.sh
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
  vllm:
    command:
      - bash
      - -lc
      - 'echo "[vLLM] Config: gpu-memory-utilization=0.34 max-model-len=4096 max-num-seqs=32"; exec vllm serve --model /model --served-model-name gemma-1b-finetune --port 30003 --host 0.0.0.0 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.34 --max-model-len 4096 --max-num-seqs 32 --enable-prefix-caching --dtype auto --trust-remote-code'
    container_name: llms_vllm
    depends_on:
      model-sync:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
        required: true
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - capabilities:
                - gpu
              driver: nvidia
              count: -1
    environment:
      AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: minioadmin
      AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1
      AWS_ENDPOINT_URL: http://minio:9000
      AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin123
      HF_HUB_OFFLINE: "1"
      NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES: compute,utility
      NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: "0"
      S3_ENDPOINT_URL: http://minio:9000
      TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE: "1"
      VLLM_GPU_MEM: "0.34"
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -sf http://localhost:30003/health || exit 1
      timeout: 10s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 2m0s
    image: vllm/vllm-openai:latest
    networks:
      llmserving: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 30003
        published: "30003"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: model_weights
        target: /model
        read_only: true
        volume: {}
networks:
  llmserving:
    name: llm_serving_llmserving
    driver: bridge
volumes:
  grafana_serving_data:
    name: llm_serving_grafana_serving_data
  litellm_serving_pg_data:
    name: llm_serving_litellm_serving_pg_data
  minio_serving_data:
    name: llm_serving_minio_serving_data
  mlflow_serving_data:
    name: llm_serving_mlflow_serving_data
  model_weights:
    name: llm_serving_model_weights
  prometheus_serving_data:
    name: llm_serving_prometheus_serving_data
  redis_serving_data:
    name: llm_serving_redis_serving_data
x-gpu-resources:
  deploy:
    resources:
      reservations:
        devices:
          - capabilities:
              - gpu
            count: all
            driver: nvidia
x-minio-creds:
  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: minioadmin
  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1
  AWS_ENDPOINT_URL: http://minio:9000
  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: minioadmin123
  S3_ENDPOINT_URL: http://minio:9000
